title: AI Model Garden Weights Training Studio
description: A VS Code-style studio for curating model variants, adjusting training weights, and monitoring live optimization runs.
author: Team

title: Copilot PMF Survey
description: Reimagined in-product PMF survey for GitHub Copilot — single-page editor tab with 5-point Likert scale, radio/checkbox option lists, and mock editor chrome.
author: Team

title: Copilot PMF Survey v2 — Compact
description: Compact variant of the PMF survey with shorter labels (≤4 words) and a reduced option set for faster completion.
author: Team

title: Voice Mode Input
description: Siri-like voice mode for chat input with frequency-based gradient animation driven by mic input, designed for developer workflows.
author: Team

title: Plugin Metadata Variations
description: Three treatments of the Agent Customizations Plugins surface enriched with richer presentation metadata — displayName, icon, category, capabilities, and starter prompts.
author: Team

title: Approvals Section (Merged Files + Hierarchy)
description: Merges File Reads + File Edits into one Files panel with per-rule access (none/read/edit). Adds User → Workspace → Managed source hierarchy with override visualization, locked managed rules, and Network post-approval review.
author: Harald Kirschner

title: Approvals Section (Proposal A)
description: Variant exploring Proposal A: unified chat.tools.<domain>.rules settings with explicit deny/ask/allow tri-state per rule.
author: Harald Kirschner

title: Copilot Status Tooltip
description: Status bar tooltip popup for Copilot Free — quick settings with toggles, eagerness control, and snooze action.
author: Team

title: Agent Orchestration Board
description: Kanban-style control board for tracking multi-agent orchestration with real-time status, dependency visualization, and human-in-the-loop decision points.
author: Team

title: Counter Demo
description: A simple interactive counter using React state. Demonstrates that client components work within the prototype sandbox.
author: Team

title: Hello World
description: A minimal static prototype to validate the scaffold. Nothing fancy — just proof that the system works.
author: Team

title: Approvals Section
description: Prototype of an Approvals section in the VS Code Agent Customizations editor, surfacing tool/server/URL approval management with inline checkboxes and workspace/user groups.
author: Harald Kirschner

title: Approvals Section (Separated)
description: Variant with Customizations and Approvals as separate sidebar section groups with their own headers.
author: Harald Kirschner
